title: Phase 9: Renal Performance Clinic (Tier 2/3)
description: Formal SPPB/6MWT assessment protocol. Billing setup (CPT 97750, 97161-63). Cash-pay longevity panel. Staffing. Outcome tracking.

title: Phase 6: Report Card + Final Card Designs (42 cards)
description: Physical report card 1:1 with digital. All 42 card front/back designs. Print-ready. OCR field mapping. QR codes for education.

title: AI-Era CKD Note Template - Complete Rebuild
description: Epic: Rebuild TKE CKD clinic note from traditional SmartPhrase to AI-era system. 37 sections, 42 cards, 9 domains, 8+ AI agents. Unifies physical report cards, digital data, Epic notes, and AI interpretation. Council-reviewed and approved.

title: Phase 0: Governance, success metrics, provider focus group
description: Define success metrics (note time, completion rate, GDMT adherence). Define note output contract. Provider focus group review of 37 sections. Start Tier 1 physical performance screening.
close_reason: Completed: governance.md, provider-focus-group.md, tier1-screening-protocol.md all written and committed

title: Phase 4: Core AI Agents (8 agents)
description: Build orchestrator + 7 domain agents: kidney_function, bp_fluid, heart_failure, pharmacotherapy, complications, medication_safety, planning_screening. 50+ test cases per agent.

title: Phase 7: Virtual Scribe + OCR Scanning
description: Whisper transcription integration. Extraction pipeline to structured fields. OCR scanning of physical cards. Human verification UI.

title: Phase 3: Epic SmartPhrase Template
description: Create new SmartPhrase aligned to section registry. SmartLists for enum fields. SmartLinks for auto-pull. Initial + follow-up versions. Test in sandbox.
close_reason: Completed: TKECKD.txt, TKECKD-INIT.txt, 60 SmartList definitions, migration-guide.md created

title: Phase 5: Pre-Visit Auto-Population Engine
description: Lab data ingestion, medication list parsing, previous note field extraction. Auto-populate 80%+ of fields. Care gap detection. Pre-visit brief generation.

title: Phase 2: Digital Note Builder Web App
description: TypeScript + React + Bun web app rendering all 37 sections from JSON schema. Two view modes (Initial/Follow-up Delta). Progressive disclosure. Export to Epic-ready text, patient summary, care team tasks.
close_reason: Phase 2 complete: Digital Note Builder with 3 exports, alerts, 108 tests, responsive mobile

title: Phase 1: Section Registry JSON Schema
description: Create schemas/section-registry.json for all 37 sections. Field types, enum definitions, validation rules. Migration mapping from legacy SmartList IDs. Unit tests.
close_reason: Completed: 4 schema files + 39 validation tests, all passing. 240+ fields, 50+ enums, 8 agents, 23 migrations.

title: Phase 1.5: Paper Prototype Testing
description: Print draft cards for 5-10 priority cards. Conduct 3-5 mock visits with providers. Document feedback. Revise sections based on real-world testing.

title: Phase 8: AI Agent Expansion (12-15 agents)
description: Split pharmacotherapy into RAAS/SGLT2i/MRA/GLP1 specialists. Split complications into anemia/MBD/electrolytes. Add nutrition, physical_performance, transplant agents.
